items.title: Veel lof voor Barça-target Schjelderup: 'Hij had nul ontzag voor Dumfries'
items.summary: Andreas Schjelderup (21) heeft vrijdagavond een goede beurt gemaakt. De Noorse aanvaller scoorde in de oefenwedstrijd tegen Nederland, en zou over belangstelling niet te klagen hebben. Barcelona zit naar verluidt achter de buitenspeler aan.

items.title: Chelsea v Aston Villa: Women’s Super League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Minute-by-minute updates from midday (GMT) clash ⚽ Sign up to Moving the Goalposts | Email Daniel Villa, meantime, will look to keep a low block, I expect, with Chastity Grant and Lucia Kendal breaking quickly and seeking to create for Kirsty Hanson. Villa currently sit eighth in the table, but will see sixth as still within reach. So where is the game? Chelsea will look to play into Kerr and, if they can, get her turned and running either in behind or with the ball. while James wanders off the left in support. To make that happen, they’ll use Keira Walsh to control the pace of the game, with Kaptein and Nusken in particular bombing on. Continue reading...

items.title: Speler van de Maand Patrick Brouwer: 'Correia is klaar voor topclub'
items.summary: Speler van de Maand Patrick Brouwer over zijn seizoen bij Telstar, de werkwijze van trainer Anthony Correia en de vrijheid in de speelstijl: 'We mogen overal lopen, soms denk ik: waar ben ik beland?' Verslaggever Jort van der Hoorn zocht de aanvaller op in Velsen-Zuid.

items.title: World Cup playoff news, Scotland reaction and WSL buildup – as it happened
items.summary: England rotated the squad after draw with Uruguay as they make their final World Cup preparetions Michael Yokhin has been speaking to those at one of Europe’s biggest surprise packages this season, FC Thun. They are set to win the Swiss league, blowing away more elaborate opponents on their way to glory. There were a couple of big games in the WSL yesterday. Continue reading...

items.title: Onana voorzichtig over kansen op WK: "We bouwen een team en dat zal tijd vergen"
items.summary: De Rode Duivels wonnen hun eerste oefenwedstrijd op Amerikaanse bodem vlot. De ruime 5-2 overwinning kwam er echter na een heel lastig wedstrijdbegin. Dat gaf Amadou Onana ook volmondig toe na afloop en hij legt uit hoe de Belgen de wedstrijd in handen namen.

items.title: De la Fuente vol lof over aanvaller van 'wereldklasse'
items.summary: De clubcarrière van Mikel Oyarzabal is niet de meest spectaculaire die je maar kunt bedenken: de Baskische aanvaller speelt al heel zijn leven voor Real Sociedad, momenteel zevende in La Liga. Spaanse bondscoach Luis de la Fuente wil hem desondanks voor geen goud missen.

items.title: Du show mais pas d'ambiance à Atlanta : "On sent que ce n'est pas vraiment un pays de foot"
items.summary: Les Diables Rouges ont vécu à Atlanta non seulement un test sportif, mais aussi un premier vrai avant-goût de la Coupe du Monde. Senne Lammens et Dodi Lukebakio ont été impressionnés par le show à l'américaine autour du match.

items.title: Vertonghen verrast: "Die liefde is eigenlijk groter dan die voor het voetbal"
items.summary: Jan Vertonghen was vrijdag te gast op de E3 Saxo Classic. De liefde voor de koers is blijkbaar met de paplepel ingegeven, zo maakt de ex-Rode Duivel duidelijk.

items.title: Penaltyheld Kovar blikt vooruit: 'Hopelijk wordt dinsdag opnieuw magisch'
items.summary: PSV-doelman Matej Kovar werd donderdagavond één van de helden van Tsjechië door twee Ierse strafschoppen te stoppen in de WK-kwalificatiewedstrijd in Praag. Zodoende mag zijn ploeg nog hopen op deelname aan de eindronde, maar met Denemarken wacht nóg een flinke horde. Kovar blikt vooruit, en ook een beetje terug.

items.title: "Te veel is te veel": supporters kondigen boycot aan voor de volgende uitmatch van Standard
items.summary: De Jupiler Pro League wordt hervat na de interlandbreak. In de strijd om een Europees ticket begint Standard op 4 april aan zijn Play-offcampagne met een verplaatsing naar OHL.

items.title: La Coupe du Monde... sans Lionel Messi ? "La décision lui revient"
items.summary: Se peut-il que Lionel Messi ne dispute pas la Coupe du Monde 2026 ? La star argentine est présente durant cette trêve internationale, mais Lionel Scaloni, son sélectionneur, est resté évasif.

items.title: Hoop op play-offs: 'Vitesse kan een hele lange neus maken'
items.summary: Vitesse maakt in de Keuken Kampioen Divisie nog altijd kans op het behalen van de play-offs om promotie naar de Eredivisie. De club die bijna niet meer bestond heeft nog vijf wedstrijden om dat voor elkaar te krijgen. KKD-watcher Chris Tempelman bespreekt het in een nieuwe aflevering van VI ZSM.

items.title: Cinq goals et... des doutes ? Les Diables ont soufflé le chaud et le froid à Atlanta
items.summary: Les Diables Rouges ont renversé un match qui avait assez mal débuté. Il y avait très clairement du positif à retenir de la prestation belge, mais aussi des points d'interrogation.

items.title: USMNT routed by Belgium in blow to WCup prep
items.summary: The USMNT suffered a setback in its preparations for the World Cup as Belgium ran rampant in the second half to emerge with a 5-2 win at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium on Saturday.

items.title: Pulisic, U.S. 'shocked' by Belgium jersey clash
items.summary: Christian Pulisic was among several U.S. players who said that the similarly colored jerseys worn by Belgium and the USMNT made it more difficult to pick out teammates.

items.title: Denver sets NWSL attendance record at Mile High
items.summary: Denver Summit set the NWSL attendance record in their inaugural home game, bringing in a crowd of 63,004 against the Washington Spirit.

items.title: USMNT handed reality check by Doku, Belgium ahead of World Cup
items.summary: Belgium provided a sobering assessment of where the USMNT currently stands, doling out a heavy 5-2 defeat that will leave Mauricio Pochettino with plenty to ponder.

items.title: Back on form: six England-based players who are doing well on loan in Europe
items.summary: Rasmus Højlund is back among the goals at Napoli while Kakub Kiwior has helped make Porto solid in defence and Largie Ramazani has given Valencia a creative spark The Dane, like many others, struggled under Ruben Amorim at Old Trafford and was packed off to Naples. He scored on his debut, a 3-1 win over Fiorentina, and has been consistent since, netting 10 goals in 26 games for Serie A’s third-placed team. “Now it’s portrayed as if I’m back and just doing really well,” Højlund, who cost United £72m when they signed him from Atalanta in August 2023, said to Denmark’s TV2 last week. “But inside myself my thoughts are in a completely different place. I’m self-critical. I still want to be even better, more involved in the games and score more goals, but it’s fun to observe how the image of me is constantly changing.” Continue reading...

items.title: Player ratings: Weah poor as USMNT suffer heavy Belgium defeat
items.summary: It was a difficult game for the U.S. against Belgium, with Tim Weah struggling to make a positive impact.

items.title: How Arbeloa is getting the best out of Real Madrid's stars
items.summary: BBC Sport looks at how Alvaro Arbeloa has managed to get the best out of the Real Madrid squad since his appointment in January.

items.title: Pas de Courtois ? Pas de problème ! "C'est flatteur d'être comparé à lui"
items.summary: Senne Lammens s'est dit satisfait de sa prestation après la victoire 2-5 des Diables Rouges face aux États-Unis. Le gardien de Manchester United a été préféré à Matz Sels par le sélectionneur Rudi Garcia et n'a pas déçu.

items.title: Geen Courtois? Geen probleem! "Mooi om met hem te worden vergeleken"
items.summary: Senne Lammens blikte na de 2-5-zege van de Rode Duivels tegen de Verenigde Staten tevreden terug op zijn prestatie. De doelman van Manchester United kreeg van bondscoach Rudi Garcia de voorkeur op Matz Sels en stelde niet teleur.

items.title: Grosse frayeur pour le sélectionneur de la Roumanie, âgé de 80 ans
items.summary: Le légendaire Mircea Lucescu a subi un grave malaise à l'entraînement ce dimanche. Il a été transporté à l'hôpital.

items.title: Nathan De Cat op plaats 7 in de geschiedenisboekjes
items.summary: De Rode Duivels hebben zaterdagavond vertrouwen getankt met een overtuigende 2-5-zege tegen de Verenigde Staten in het Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Na een kwalificatiecampagne met de nodige twijfels was de overwinning meer dan welkom voor de ploeg van bondscoach Rudi Garcia.

items.title: Fans booing Scotland surprise and disappoint Clarke
items.summary: Scotland head coach Steve Clarke takes positives from his side's friendly defeat by Japan at Hampden, but expresses disappointment at the boos that accompanied the full-time whistle.

items.title: 'Scotland's Hampden warriors return to reserved selves'
items.summary: Scotland were too flat and timid in defeat by Japan as the clock ticks towards their World Cup return, writes Tom English.

items.title: Russo 'stepping up' as Arsenal lead hunt for European places
items.summary: With Arsenal chasing a place in next season's Champions League, England striker Alessia Russo has hit form at just the right time - as her 22-minute Women's Super League hat-trick against Tottenham proves.

items.title: Were England players really 'playing for themselves' - and what next?
items.summary: Did England manager Thomas Tuchel judge this international break correctly by naming such a large squad? Or was it a missed opportunity?

items.title: Running on empty? Premier League teams falter under weight of endless schedule | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: Players are not covering the distances of old – they are not being lazy but adapting to demands of an arduous campaign There is nothing English football admires more than honest endeavour, which is perhaps a consequence of the league’s origins in the industrial cities of the north and Midlands. “He put in a shift.” “She did her job.” “He gave his all.” The language of football is the language of the pit or the factory floor. All top-level players these days are supremely skilled, but still we demand that they be exhausted by the final whistle, legs leaden with effort, hair soaked with sweat. Which was why it seemed to cause such consternation when Alan Shearer mentioned on Match of the Day last Saturday that Chelsea have run less than their opponents in every Premier League game they have played this season. Continue reading...

items.title: Stones the exception to Tuchel’s World Cup rule despite cold shoulder from Guardiola
items.summary: England’s head coach still rates injury-prone Manchester City defender and seems likely to be a fundamental part of his squad this summer – if fit Every manager reserves the right to make an exception to the rules. For Thomas Tuchel, it is John Stones. The England head coach has watched Stones endure a lost season at Manchester City; another one, really, because things were similar for him last time out – certainly in terms of appearances. Once again, there have been injury problems, the sense that Stones cannot get himself fully right compounded over this past week with England. The 31-year-old struggled in training and when he felt something in a calf muscle on Thursday, Tuchel was forced to leave him out of the Wembley friendly against Uruguay on Friday night. He started Fikayo Tomori alongside Harry Maguire in central defence in a drab game that ended 1-1, while Stones has gone back to his club and will play no part against Japan on Tuesday. Continue reading...
